sections.paragraph:
Original: לטשׁ

Transliteration: lâṭash

Phonetic: law-tash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sharpen, hammer, whet
    1. (Qal)
      1. to hammer
      2. to sharpen (sword)
      3. hammerer (participle)
    2. (Pual) to be sharpened

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1110

Part(s) of speech: Verb
